title: Son Of Hwéeldi
summary: March 13, 2017 Lead vocalist and guitarist J.J. Otero grew up singing in church, picked up the guitar at age 17, and started the band Saving Damsels in 2007. That band is now called Son of Hwéeldi. Inspired by today’s politics, the band’s “Native Soul Rock” is now “Resistance Rock”. Along with a new...
